title: Frozen public CLOB depth with explicit batch arrivals and MM overlays

analysis_policy.evidence_status: public Polymarket anonymous aggregated depth captured 2026-07-17; not Sybil flow; batch arrivals, maker identities, and maker capital are synthetic
analysis_policy.primary_unit: one frozen public-depth case, budget ratio, and solver
analysis_policy.hard_gates: no panic, solver failure, timeout, empty result, or verifier-invalid landed result
analysis_policy.soft_metrics: wall-time median and tails; retained-cash objective and welfare gaps; certificate and landing tails; allocation and price distance; MM utilization
analysis_policy.selection_policy: prefer Pareto improvements; preserve the raw fragmented portfolio and never present synthetic budget overlays as observed maker capital
analysis_policy.corpus_policy: six volume-ranked category events retain at most 20 near-touch levels per token side and complete NegRisk groups; event workloads add explicit depth-calibrated arrivals and shared-budget overlays, while one raw cross-event portfolio remains untouched

lp.label: Production LP-SLP plus visible landing trim

rc-structural.label: Certified retained-cash FW with structural oracle

exact-components-bundle-structural.label: Exact connectivity components around the structural pacing bundle
